## Checklist
- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the [`BRAND.md`](../BRAND.md) voice (concrete, honest, bilingual if user-facing)
- [ ] I follow [`DESIGN.md`](../DESIGN.md) (semantic Tailwind tokens, no raw colors)
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] I added tests for any non-trivial logic change
- [ ] If user-facing: both RU and EN strings are added (no machine translation)
- [ ] If new localStorage usage: key is in `src/lib/constants.ts` and reads via `useLocalStorage`
- [ ] If new Telegram link: built via `src/lib/telegram.ts`
